Field.name: PrimaryKey
Field.comment: Unique identifier of each record in this table

Calculation.Text: Get( UUID )

Field.name: CreationTimestamp
Field.comment: Date and time each record was created

Field.name: CreatedBy
Field.comment: Account name of the user who created each record

Field.name: ModificationTimestamp
Field.comment: Date and time each record was last modified

Field.name: ModifiedBy
Field.comment: Account name of the user who last modified each record

Calculation.Text: BlockTemplate::Descriptive image
Case( IsEmpty ( BlockTemplate id ); PrettifyDash (Name) ; PrettifyDash (BlockTemplate::Name))
Case ( BlockTemplate id ; BlockTemplate::Label override text 1 ; "Text 1 id" )
Case ( BlockTemplate id ; BlockTemplate::Label override text 2 ; "Text 2 id" )
Case ( BlockTemplate id ; BlockTemplate::Label override text 3 ; "Text 3 id" )

Let ( [ json1 = JSON declaration; json2 = Substitute ( json1 ; ["text_1" ; Label override text 1 JSON] ; ["text_2" ; Label override text 2 JSON] ; ["text_3" ; Label override text 3 JSON] ; ["text_4" ; Label override text 4 JSON] ; ["text_5" ; Label override text 5 JSON] ; ["text_6" ; Label override text 6 JSON] ; ["text_7" ; Label override text 7 JSON] ; ["media_1" ; Label override media 1 JSON] ; ["media_2" ; Label override media 2 JSON] ) ]; JSONFormatElements ( JSONSetElement ( json2 ; ["symbol_id" ; PrimaryKey ; JSONString]; ["symbol_template" ; Case ( BlockTemplate id ; True ; False ) ; JSONBoolean]; ["symbol_template_id" ; BlockTemplate::PrimaryKey ; JSONString]; ["symbol_name"; JSON title ; JSONString])) )
Case ( BlockTemplate id ; BlockTemplate::Label override media 1 ; "Media 1" )
Case ( BlockTemplate id ; BlockTemplate::Label override media 2 ; "Media 2" )
If ( BlockTemplate id ="" ; PrettifyUnderScore(FAT Block::Label override text 1 ) ; PrettifyUnderScore(BlockTemplate::Label override text 1) )
If ( BlockTemplate id ="" ; PrettifyUnderScore(FAT Block::Label override text 2 ) ; PrettifyUnderScore(BlockTemplate::Label override text 2))
If ( BlockTemplate id ="" ; PrettifyUnderScore(FAT Block::Label override text 3 ) ; PrettifyUnderScore(BlockTemplate::Label override text 3) )
If ( BlockTemplate id ="" ; PrettifyUnderScore(FAT Block::Label override container 1 ) ; PrettifyUnderScore(BlockTemplate::Label override media 1) )
If ( BlockTemplate id ="" ; PrettifyUnderScore(FAT Block::Label override container 2 ) ; PrettifyUnderScore(BlockTemplate::Label override media 2) )
Case ( BlockTemplate id ; BlockTemplate::Label override text 4 ; "Text 4 id" )
If ( BlockTemplate id ="" ; PrettifyUnderScore(FAT Block::Label override text 4 ) ; PrettifyUnderScore(BlockTemplate::Label override text 4) )
If ( BlockTemplate id = "" ; PrettifyUnderScore(Label override List Text 1 ) ; PrettifyUnderScore(BlockTemplate::Label override CA Text 1 OLD))
If ( BlockTemplate id = "" ; PrettifyUnderScore(Label override List Text 2 ) ; PrettifyUnderScore(BlockTemplate::Label override CA Text 2 OLD))
If ( BlockTemplate id = "" ; PrettifyUnderScore(Label override List Value ) ; PrettifyUnderScore(BlockTemplate::Label override CA Value OLD))
If ( BlockTemplate id = "" ; PrettifyUnderScore(Label override List Media ) ; PrettifyUnderScore(BlockTemplate::Label override CA Media OLD))
0+Count ( FAT Page item @ Block::PrimaryKey )
Case ( BlockTemplate id ; BlockTemplate::Label override text 5 ; "Text 5 id" )
Case ( BlockTemplate id ; BlockTemplate::Label override text 6 ; "Text 6 id" )
Case ( BlockTemplate id ; BlockTemplate::Label override text 7 ; "Text 7 id" )
If ( BlockTemplate id ="" ; PrettifyUnderScore(FAT Block::Label override text 5 ) ; PrettifyUnderScore(BlockTemplate::Label override text 5) )
If ( BlockTemplate id ="" ; PrettifyUnderScore(FAT Block::Label override text 6 ) ; PrettifyUnderScore(BlockTemplate::Label override text 6) )
If ( BlockTemplate id ="" ; PrettifyUnderScore(FAT Block::Label override text 7 ) ; PrettifyUnderScore(BlockTemplate::Label override text 7) )

Field.name: Number of media containers
Field.comment: Amount of media containers to override

Field.name: JSON declaration
Field.comment: Den här är tänkt att användas i ett senare skede för att slippa låte page item hålla kolla på exporten för JSON för alla symboltyper.

Calculation.Text: Let ( [ json1 = JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["symbol_type" ; PrettifyUnderScore (Block type) ; JSONString ] ); json2= Case ( Number of text fields=1 ; JSONSetElement ( json1 ; ["text_1" ; "*t1*" ; JSONString ] ); Number of text fields=2; JSONSetElement ( json1 ; ["text_1" ; "*t1*" ; JSONString ]; ["text_2" ; "*t2*" ; JSONString ] ); Number of text fields=3; JSONSetElement ( json1 ; ["text_1" ; "*t1*" ; JSONString ]; ["text_2" ; "*t2*" ; JSONString ]; ["text_3" ; "*t3*" ; JSONString ] ); Number of text fields=4; JSONSetElement ( json1 ; ["text_1" ; "*t1*" ; JSONString ]; ["text_2" ; "*t2*" ; JSONString ]; ["text_3" ; "*t3*" ; JSONString ]; ["text_4" ; "*t4*" ; JSONString ] ); Number of text fields=5; JSONSetElement ( json1 ; ["text_1" ; "*t1*" ; JSONString ]; ["text_2" ; "*t2*" ; JSONString ]; ["text_3" ; "*t3*" ; JSONString ]; ["text_4" ; "*t4*" ; JSONString ]; ["text_5" ; "*t5*" ; JSONString ] ); Number of text fields=6; JSONSetElement ( json1 ; ["text_1" ; "*t1*" ; JSONString ]; ["text_2" ; "*t2*" ; JSONString ]; ["text_3" ; "*t3*" ; JSONString ]; ["text_4" ; "*t4*" ; JSONString ]; ["text_5" ; "*t5*" ; JSONString ]; ["text_6" ; "*t6*" ; JSONString ] ); Number of text fields=7; JSONSetElement ( json1 ; ["text_1" ; "*t1*" ; JSONString ]; ["text_2" ; "*t2*" ; JSONString ]; ["text_3" ; "*t3*" ; JSONString ]; ["text_4" ; "*t4*" ; JSONString ]; ["text_5" ; "*t5*" ; JSONString ]; ["text_6" ; "*t6*" ; JSONString ]; ["text_7" ; "*t7*" ; JSONString ] ); json1 ); json3_1= Case(Number of text fields>0 And BlockTemplate::Text 1 Style type≠""; JSONSetElement ( json2 ; "text_1_textstyle" ; BlockTemplate::Text 1 TextStyle ; JSONString); json2 ); json3_2= Case(Number of text fields>1 And BlockTemplate::Text 2 Style type≠""; JSONSetElement ( json3_1 ; "text_2_textstyle" ; BlockTemplate::Text 2 TextStyle ; JSONString); json3_1 ); json3_3= Case(Number of text fields>2 And BlockTemplate::Text 3 Style type≠""; JSONSetElement ( json3_2 ; "text_3_textstyle" ; BlockTemplate::Text 3 TextStyle ; JSONString); json3_2 ); json3_4= Case(Number of text fields>3 And BlockTemplate::Text 4 Style type≠""; JSONSetElement ( json3_3 ; "text_4_textstyle" ; BlockTemplate::Text 4 TextStyle ; JSONString); json3_3 ); json3_5= Case(Number of text fields>4 And BlockTemplate::Text 5 Style type≠""; JSONSetElement ( json3_4 ; "text_5_textstyle" ; BlockTemplate::Text 5 TextStyle ; JSONString); json3_4 ); json3_6= Case(Number of text fields>5 And BlockTemplate::Text 6 Style type≠""; JSONSetElement ( json3_5 ; "text_6_textstyle" ; BlockTemplate::Text 6 TextStyle ; JSONString); json3_5 ); json3_7= Case(Number of text fields>6 And BlockTemplate::Text 7 Style type≠""; JSONSetElement ( json3_6 ; "text_7_textstyle" ; BlockTemplate::Text 7 TextStyle ; JSONString); json3_6 ); json4 = Case ( Number of media containers=1 ; JSONSetElement ( json3_7 ; ["media_1" ; "*c1*" ; JSONString ] ); Number of media containers=2; JSONSetElement ( json3_7 ; ["media_1" ; "*c1*" ; JSONString ]; ["media_2" ; "*c2*" ; JSONString ] ); json3_7) ]; JSONFormatElements (json4 ) )
If ( BlockTemplate id = "" ; PrettifyUnderScore(Label override List Text 3 ) ; PrettifyUnderScore(BlockTemplate::Label override CA Text 3 OLD))

Field.name: Old PrimaryKey from clone
Field.comment: If Title is cloned this id is used for reference in clone script

Calculation.Text: List template @ Block template::Value 1 type
BlockTemplate::Descriptive icon

Field.name: Block page type
Field.comment: Used for VL when page type is special and not default

Field.name: IO Type Legacy
Field.comment: Used for VL in Block @ Page item - only IOs of specific type

Calculation.Text: BlockTemplate::IO Type Legacy
List ( FAT IO Page item VL Legacy::PrimaryKey) & ¶ & "SOME-ID-FOR-UNIVER-SAL"

Field.name: List enabled
Field.comment: Decides if this Block uses a Title List or not. Will not export to FAT Block

Calculation.Text: BlockTemplate::Media 1 Crop Fit
BlockTemplate::Media 1 IO
BlockTemplate::Media 2 Crop Fit
BlockTemplate::Media 2 IO

Field.name: Description for authors
Field.comment: A calculated field where authors can copy and paste text without changing description

Calculation.Text: FAT Block::Description & "¶¶" & Case ( Label override text 1= "Text 1 id"; "No text input fields"; "Text input fields: " & Label override text 1) & Case ( Label override text 2= "Text 2 id"; ""; ", " & Label override text 2) & Case ( Label override text 3= "Text 3 id"; ""; ", " & Label override text 3) & Case ( Label override text 4= "Text 4 id"; ""; ", " & Label override text 4) & Case ( Label override text 5= "Text 5 id"; ""; ", " & Label override text 5) & Case ( Label override text 6= "Text 6 id"; ""; ", " & Label override text 6) & Case ( Label override text 7= "Text 7 id"; ""; ", " & Label override text 7) & ".¶¶" & Case ( Label override container 1= "Media 1"; "No media input fields"; "Media input fields: " & Label override container 1) & Case ( Label override container 2= "Media 2"; ""; ", " & Label override container 2) & ".¶¶" & Case ( Number of page item instances = 0 ; "This block is not yet being used in this title."; Number of page item instances = 1 ; "This block is used 1 time in this title."; "This block is used " & Number of page item instances & " times in this title." ) & "¶¶"
FAT Page item::gIOGroup
BlockTemplate::List template id
